steps.title: Calculate the retail price from the wholesale price
steps.content:
The retail price is 310% of the wholesale price. Since 310% equals 3.1, multiply:
$$\text{Retail price} = 3.1 \times 6.00 = 18.60$$
The retail price is \$18.60.

steps.title: Apply the 75% discount to get the final price
steps.content:
A discount of 75% off means the customer pays the remaining 25% of the retail price (since 100% - 75% = 25%):
$$\text{Discounted price} = 0.25 \times 18.60 = 4.65$$
The discounted price of each remaining shirt is \$4.65.
